title: Income Tax Appeal Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan
description: Income tax appeal services in Mumbai. CIT(A), ITAT Mumbai representation. Assessment dispute resolution, demand reduction. Call +91-77000 89597.
bodyText:
Looking for income tax appeal services in Mumbai? Virtual Auditor handles income tax appeals before CIT(A), ITAT Mumbai Bench, and Bombay High Court — led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA). We analyse your assessment order, identify strong appeal grounds, and fight for demand reduction or deletion.

What is Income Tax Appeal Mumbai | Virtual Auditor — CA V. Viswanathan?

  HEADING2: What We Deliver
  Comprehensive assessment order analysis and merit assessment. Appeal grounds with legal citations from Supreme Court, Bombay High Court, and ITAT Mumbai decisions. Form 35 (CIT(A)) or Form 36 (ITAT) filing within statutory deadlines. Detailed written submissions with factual and legal arguments. Virtual hearing representation through ITBA e-proceedings portal. Physical appearance at ITAT Mumbai Bench (Pratyaksha Kar Bhawan, Bandra-Kurla Complex). Stay of demand application to prevent bank attachment and coercive recovery. Cross-objection filing where the department has also appealed.
  HEADING2: Why Choose Virtual Auditor for Income Tax Appeals in Mumbai
  ITAT Mumbai is one of the busiest benches in India, handling a wide range of complex issues — real estate transactions, share trading disputes, startup angel tax assessments, transfer pricing adjustments, and TDS default demands. CA V. Viswanathan brings practical appellate experience across these issue categories. Our Mumbai office provides local coordination for ITAT Mumbai hearings. We handle appeals at all monetary levels — from small disallowances to multi-crore demands. Every appeal includes thorough legal research with current precedents specific to Bombay High Court and ITAT Mumbai Bench decisions.
  HEADING2: Our Process
  Step 1: Assessment order review — demand breakup, issue identification, merit assessment. Step 2: Urgent stay application if bank attachment or recovery proceedings are initiated. Step 3: Appeal filing within statutory time limits. Step 4: Written submissions with legal research and precedent analysis. Step 5: Hearing representation — virtual or physical at ITAT Mumbai. Step 6: Appeal order analysis and advisory on further appeal if needed.
  HEADING2: Get Started Today
  Received an income tax demand in Mumbai? Contact us:
  Call/WhatsApp: +91-77000 89597
  Email: support@virtualauditor.in
  Visit: Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, Goregaon West, Mumbai 400062
  Free assessment order review. Protect your rights — timely appeal is critical.

faqs.a: ITAT Mumbai Bench is located at Pratyaksha Kar Bhawan, Bandra-Kurla Complex, Mumbai. Virtual hearings are also available through the ITAT video conferencing system. We handle both physical and virtual appearances.

faqs.q: Can you help with angel tax (Section 56(2)(viib)) appeals in Mumbai?
faqs.a: Yes. Angel tax disputes are common for Mumbai startups. We handle appeals against Section 56(2)(viib) additions, including valuation report defence, DPIIT exemption claims, and arguments based on recent judicial precedents and CBDT circulars.

faqs.q: What percentage of income tax appeals succeed?
faqs.a: Success depends on the quality of grounds and legal arguments. ITAT statistics show approximately 30-40% of appeals result in full or partial relief. Our case-specific analysis before filing ensures we pursue appeals only where strong grounds exist.
